Artist Portal

Your Creative Workflow Guide

Everything you need to accept, manage, and deliver stunning commissions at Purrfect Pal Studio.

Tutorial 01

Getting Started as an Artist

youtube.com/embed/P8bfttrz9G4
Process

Four Steps to Complete an Order

01
📋

Jobs

Visit the Jobs page to see all orders assigned to you based on your art style. Your queue starts here.

● Pending
02
🎨

Ongoing Orders

Accept a job and it moves to Ongoing Orders. Hit "View Details" to start work, message clients, and track progress.

● Active
03
🔍

Detail Page

  • Uploaded pet images
  • Client notes & background preferences
  • Live chat with client
  • Final artwork upload form
04
✦

Submit Artwork

  • 300×300 branding image
  • High-resolution downloadable file
  • Pet name, breed & detail level

Clients may request up to 4 revisions. Chat early to avoid surprises.

◆
After Delivery

What Happens Next

A
📁 Order Archive

Past Orders

Once a client marks an order complete, it's archived here. All files and notes remain viewable — chat is disabled after completion.

✓ Files preserved 🔒 Read-only archive
🗂
View Past Orders
Browse your completed commissions
›
B

Artist Profile & Stats

Build your reputation and manage your presence on the platform.

  • Jobs completed & total earnings
  • Upload or change profile photo
  • Update bio & skills
Edit Your Profile →
Tutorial 02

How to Report if You Can't Fulfil an Order

youtube.com/embed/ol9UOuPtWPo
◆
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

No problem — simply inform us. It will be removed from your dashboard and reassigned to another artist with the same style.
Yes — only if you can complete it on time without any issues.
Use the chat box available on the Detail Page to communicate directly with the client. Ask for clarification or reference photos whenever needed.
You must upload:
  • A branding image (300×300px)
  • A high-resolution downloadable file
  • Pet name, breed, and design detail level

The submission form is on the Detail Page of the ongoing order.

Each client is allowed up to 4 revision requests. You'll be notified through chat when a revision is requested.
